items.title: Reframing Superintelligence: Comprehensive AI Services as General Intelligence
items.reason_ja: 既にアーカイブ済み。CAIS概念はconcepts/cais, concepts/comprehensive-ai-services, entities/k-eric-drexlerで詳細カバー済み。
items.body_excerpt: K. Eric Drexler's 210-page FHI tech report framing superintelligence as distributed CAIS rather than monolithic agents.

items.title: MAI-Thinking-1: Building a Hill-Climbing Machine — Technical Report
items.reason_ja: 既存Wikiで完全カバー済み。entities/mai-thinking-1 (148行), concepts/mai-thinking-1-tech-report (227行), concepts/microsoft-mai-models (71行) にてアーキテクチャ・訓練・ベンチマークが詳細に記述済み。raw articleは全ページのsourcesに登録済み。
items.body_excerpt: MAI-Thinking-1: 35B active/1T total MoE reasoning model. 30T tokens pre-training from scratch, no distillation. Modified GRPO with adaptive entropy control, 256K context. 52.8% SWE-Bench Pro, 97.0% AIME 2025, 87.7% LiveCodeBench v6.

items.title: Awesome Agent Evals — curated list (443+ resources)
items.reason_ja: 既存Wikiで完全カバー済み。concepts/ai-benchmarks/benchflow-tool (118行) にてフレームワーク・Awesome Agent Evals一覧・12のMust-Read・企業ランドスケープが詳細に記述済み。raw articleはsourcesに登録済み。
items.body_excerpt: 443+ curated links for building and evaluating AI agents. 12 must-read starter set (Shunyu Yao, Eugene Yan, Han-Chung Lee, Hamel Husain, Jason Wei, etc.). Depth-4 citation crawl (11.6K papers), 47 talks transcribed.

items.title: Grant Sanderson — AI and the future of math
items.reason_ja: 既にアーカイブ済み。entities/grant-sanderson (141行) にてSandersonのAI×数学に関する見解をカバー済み。
items.body_excerpt: Dwarkesh Patel interviews Grant Sanderson (3Blue1Brown) on AI progress in mathematics. Topics: IMO benchmarks, conceptual breakthroughs, Riemann hypothesis, hidden bridges between fields.

items.title: News from WWDC26: WebKit in Safari 27 beta
items.reason_ja: 既にアーカイブ済み。AIトピック非該当（WebKitブラウザエンジンの機能更新 — CSS/HTML/WASMの525の修正）。concepts/safari-mcp-serverは別トピックのMCP関連ページ。
items.body_excerpt: Safari 27 beta: 58 new features, 525 fixes. Customizable <select>, scroll anchoring, WASM JSPI, anchor positioning, CSS features. WebKit engine quality improvements.
